queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the relationship between the absence of a checking account and reduced credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Statistical assessment of checking account balances below zero DM as a determinant of decreased credit risk exposure.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Investigation into the impact of savings account balances below 100 DM on improved creditworthiness and default likelihood.
